vo_text: Born on July 12? Your card is the 3 of Diamonds — and its shadow side explains a lot. In Cardology it's called The Success Communicator. You're the material storyteller. You're good at selling—ideas, products, yourself. The shadow side? You oversell. You make things sound better than they are. You're so focused on the sale that you don't deliver on the promise. Your gift? Natural sales and persuasion ability. Plus talent for making things attractive and desirable. You're learning integrity over persuasion. Find your own card free — link in bio. Card Blueprints.

vo_phrases.text: You're good at selling—ideas, products, yourself.

title: Born July 12? Your Birth Card Is the 3 of Diamonds #shorts
caption:
Born on July 12, your Cardology birth card is the 3 of Diamonds.
A mirror, not a forecast. Find your own card free at cardblueprints.com.
